---
title: ""
author: "Giorgio Arcara"
date: ""
format:
  beamer:
    theme: metropolis
    keep-tex: true
incremental: false
header-includes:
  \setbeamerfont{title}{size=\large}
  \usepackage{hyperref}
  \setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]

---

```{=latex}
% TITLE SLIDES
\title{Clinical Research Methodology\\ \vspace{1em} \emph{C. Activity}}
\author{Giorgio Arcara,\\ University of Padua \\ IRCCS San Camillo, Venice}

\titlegraphic{

\vspace*{7cm}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{../Figures/LogoSanCamilloIRCCS_Unipd_alpha.png}
\begin{center}
\vspace{-2.2em}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{../Figures/CC_license_3_0.png}
\end{center}
}
\date{\today}
\maketitle
```


## Evidence Based Clinical Practice
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\Large \textbf{For which aspects of clinical practice are evidence needed?}}

\includegraphics[width=0.3\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```


## How can a clinical practitioner contribute to the collection of evidence?

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.4\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```


## Let us analyze an RCT study together


## What are the main limitations of a parallel arms RCT?

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.4\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```

## What are the problems/limitations of a systematic review and meta-analysis?

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.4\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```

## Let us analyze a review/meta-analysis together
